title.en: China-to-Benin Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入贝宁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入貝寧：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Benin ANM conformity requirements, ARE grid-connection and operator licensing, SBEE/CEB connection approval, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 EMC, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, donor-funded project equipment gates (MCC Compact, World Bank, AFD), and West Africa high-temperature/dust derating — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与贝宁ANM合格评定要求、ARE并网及运营商许可、SBEE/CEB并网审批、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用事业接口、IEC 62920/IEC 61000-3-2 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数、捐助方资助项目设备门槛（MCC Compact、世界银行、法国开发署）及西非高温/粉尘降额——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與貝寧ANM合格評定要求、ARE併網及運營商許可、SBEE/CEB併網審批、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用事業接口、IEC 62920/IEC 61000-3-2 EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數、捐助方資助項目設備門檻（MCC Compact、世界銀行、法國開發署）及西非高溫/粉塵降額——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANM conformity scope determination, ARE licensing decision, SBEE/CEB grid-connection approval, donor procurement eligibility determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Benin ANM Technical Regulations, ARE licensing requirements, SBEE/CEB connection procedures, donor-funded project equipment eligibility lists (MCC, World Bank, AFD), and applicable IEC standards with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANM合格评定范围裁定、ARE许可决定、SBEE/CEB并网审批、捐助方采购资格裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行贝宁ANM技术法规、ARE许可要求、SBEE/CEB并网程序、捐助方资助项目设备资格清单（MCC、世界银行、法国开发署）及适用IEC标准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANM合格評定範圍裁定、ARE許可決定、SBEE/CEB併網審批、捐助方採購資格裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行貝寧ANM技術法規、ARE許可要求、SBEE/CEB併網程序、捐助方資助項目設備資格清單（MCC、世界銀行、法國開發署）及適用IEC標準。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Benin, the key practical points are: (1) Benin and China share the same 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal grid voltage — eliminating the voltage re-parameterisation gap that exists for markets like Qatar (240/415 V); (2) however, ARE licensing, SBEE/CEB grid-connection approval, and IEC-based compliance evidence remain mandatory gates that Chinese GB/T documents cannot satisfy alone; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required for ANM conformity and donor-funded project acceptance; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 interface compliance evidence are required for ARE/SBEE grid-connection approval; (5) IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 EMC evidence is required under ANM's IEC-aligned framework and donor procurement specifications; (6) West Africa's high ambient temperature (35–50°C), dust, and humidity impose environmental qualification requirements beyond what standard Chinese laboratory testing covers. Chinese GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy Benin's IEC-referenced requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口贝宁时，主要实际要点包括：（1）贝宁与中国共用220/380 V、50 Hz标称电网电压——消除了卡塔尔（240/415 V）等市场存在的电压重新参数化差距；（2）然而，ARE许可、SBEE/CEB并网审批及基于IEC的合规证据仍是中国GB/T文件单独无法满足的强制性门槛；（3）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据是ANM合格评定和捐助方资助项目准入所必需的；（4）IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727接口合规证据是ARE/SBEE并网审批所必需的；（5）IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC证据是ANM的IEC协调框架和捐助方采购规格所要求的；（6）西非高环境温度（35–50°C）、粉尘和湿度带来的环境适应性要求超出中国标准实验室测试的覆盖范围。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足贝宁的IEC并网要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口貝寧時，主要實際要點包括：（1）貝寧與中國共用220/380 V、50 Hz標稱電網電壓——消除了卡達（240/415 V）等市場存在的電壓重新參數化差距；（2）然而，ARE許可、SBEE/CEB併網審批及基於IEC的合規證據仍是中國GB/T文件單獨無法滿足的強制性門檻；（3）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據是ANM合格評定和捐助方資助項目准入所必需的；（4）IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727接口合規證據是ARE/SBEE併網審批所必需的；（5）IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2 EMC證據是ANM的IEC協調框架和捐助方採購規格所要求的；（6）西非高環境溫度（35–50°C）、粉塵和濕度帶來的環境適應性要求超出中國標準實驗室測試的覆蓋範圍。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足貝寧的IEC併網要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
